name: peace_boosts_both_horizontal_neighbors
note: Wiki simulator (2026-06-02): with peace at (0,2), the artifact at (0,1) showed boost badge 3 and (0,3) showed boost 3; an unboosted artifact at (0,0) showed boost 0. Confirms peace [-1,0]+3 / [1,0]+3 and the up-positive coordinate convention.

name: base_row_shape_boosts_whole_row
note: Wiki simulator (2026-06-02): base (기반, shape row +1) at (1,1) boosted every artifact sharing row 1 by +1 (fire_bolt@(1,0)->1/1, ohia_lehua@(1,3)->1/2) and left other rows at 0 (criton@(0,1), ignition@(3,1)). Confirms row shape = the tablet's whole row.
